input.prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic UGC realism. Early morning in a clean, softly lit modern kitchen flowing into a home workspace. Maya, a 44-year-old woman with shoulder-length dark brown hair, light natural makeup, and an understated beige knit set, stays visible the entire clip. Start with a slow handheld push-in as she leans on the counter with a tired but composed expression, then picks up her coffee and pauses before opening her laptop. Cut within the same scene to her rubbing her shoulder lightly and exhaling while looking at her calendar, suggesting subtle low energy and slower recovery, not distress. Natural window light, muted neutral tones, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, premium wellness mood. Keep actions simple and believable, one dominant forward camera move, no product visible, no text, no other people. Keep the same named on-camera persona continuity across person-led clips.
AUDIO: Calm, trustworthy female narration with measured pacing. On-camera natural silence from Maya except one soft exhale. Narration: "I didn’t wake up feeling awful… just not as steady, sharp, or recovered as I used to." Soft minimal piano with warm ambient pad underneath. Subtle SFX: ceramic mug set on counter, laptop open, gentle fabric movement, quiet morning room tone. Ambient audio: soft kitchen hum and distant city birds through the window.

Vertical 9:16 premium lifestyle scene with strict continuity. Same Maya, same hair and natural appearance, now in the same home setting with coherent wardrobe progression: beige knit with a light cream overshirt. Keep her visible throughout. The Bioluxe Lab NMN bottle is naturally integrated on a tidy kitchen counter; use image reference for packaging continuity. Begin with a medium over-counter shot as Maya reaches for the bottle, opens it, takes one capsule with water, then transitions in one smooth lateral camera move to her later that morning walking calmly outside in soft sunlight with more upright posture and relaxed focus. Show a believable early improvement: composed energy, not dramatic transformation. Bright natural lighting, clean premium color palette, realistic hand interaction with the bottle, authentic supplement routine, no text, no exaggerated VFX. Keep the same named on-camera persona continuity across person-led clips.
AUDIO: Calm expert narration, confident and clear. Optional soft on-camera line from Maya, almost under her breath: "Simple enough." Narration: "So I started supporting my routine with Bioluxe Lab NMN—500 milligrams each morning, a direct NAD+ precursor designed to support cellular energy and healthy aging." Music lifts slightly with gentle percussion added to the piano bed. SFX: bottle cap twist, capsule shake, sip of water, soft footsteps outdoors. Ambient audio: quiet kitchen tone transitioning to light outdoor breeze and distant neighborhood ambience.

Vertical 9:16 clean premium product-only hero shot. Use image reference for exact Bioluxe Lab NMN bottle identity. Place the bottle on a light stone surface beside a glass of water with soft morning sun streaks, then execute one slow controlled orbiting macro move that reveals the label clearly while keeping the composition elegant and minimal. Add subtle secondary elements that suggest routine and purity: a neatly folded linen napkin and a softly blurred healthy breakfast plate far in the background. High-end commercial lighting with crisp highlights, gentle shadows, luxurious realism, sharp focus on the bottle, no person on camera, no text, no clutter, no medical imagery. Product-only shot. No people, faces, or body parts visible.
AUDIO: Calm, trustworthy expert narration with polished finish. Narration: "High-purity NMN, crafted for daily cellular wellness support. Small habit, smart routine. Shop now at bioluxelab.com." Music resolves warmly with soft piano and airy synth tail. SFX: faint glass clink and delicate room tone. Ambient audio: quiet serene interior morning atmosphere.
